disclaimer: AI-assisted research from public web sources — indicative, verify before quoting a client.

ATTITUDE AT KIM YAM.note: A boutique 999-year leasehold development (rare near-freehold tenure) of just 33 units completed in 2011 along Kim Yam Road in District 9's River Valley. It sits about 800m from Great World MRT (TE15) on the Thomson-East Coast Line, giving direct links to Orchard.

LUMIERE.note: A 99-year leasehold, 168-unit development on Mistri Road (D02) completed in 2010, near Tanjong Pagar and Shenton Way (TE19) MRT stations. The new Prince Edward Road MRT (Circle Line Stage 6) begins passenger service in July 2026, and the area is set to benefit from the future Greater Southern Waterfront redevelopment.

SELETAR PARK RESIDENCE.note: A 99-year leasehold, 276-unit condo at 21 Seletar Road (D28) completed in 2015, developed by Asplenium Land (Tong Eng Group) and designed by SCDA Architects. It is not directly MRT-served (nearest rail is Fernvale LRT roughly 900m away), with nearby malls including Greenwich V and The Seletar Mall.

ONE-NORTH RESIDENCES.note: A 99-year leasehold, 405-unit development completed in 2009 by a UOL and Kheng Leong joint venture, sitting next to one-north MRT (CC23). The immediate one-north area is seeing substantial new supply, including Bloomsbury Residences (358 units, launched 2025), LyndenWoods and Penrith.

ICON.note: A 99-year leasehold, 646-unit development at 10 Gopeng Street (D02) completed in 2007 by Far East Organization, sitting atop the Icon Village retail podium and directly across from Tanjong Pagar MRT. It stands to benefit from the new Prince Edward Road MRT (Circle Line Stage 6, opening July 2026) and the Greater Southern Waterfront transformation.

JOOL SUITES.note: Freehold boutique development completed in 2014 with 52 units, located within roughly a 2-minute walk of Farrer Park MRT (North East Line) in the Jalan Besar/Kallang area of District 8.

THE COAST AT SENTOSA COVE.note: A 99-year leasehold waterfront project completed in 2009 with 249 units in the gated Sentosa Cove enclave (District 4); resale history is mixed, with EdgeProp recording both large profits and sizeable losses across transactions and no en-bloc activity reported.

TROPIKA EAST.note: Freehold development at 1 & 3 Foo Kim Lin Road (District 14) completed in 2016 with 105 units, within reach of Kembangan (EW6) and Eunos (EW7) MRT stations and Paya Lebar Quarter amenities.

QUEENS.note: A 99-year leasehold (from 1998) development completed in 2002 with 722 units sitting right beside Queenstown MRT (East-West Line); the surrounding Stirling Road area has seen newer large-scale supply such as the 1,259-unit Stirling Residences (TOP 2022) that competes for buyers and tenants.

THE WOODGROVE.note: Located in Woodlands (District 25) near Woodlands and Marsiling MRT stations, it stands to benefit from the Woodlands Regional Centre development and the Johor Bahru–Singapore RTS Link at Woodlands North, whose passenger service is targeted to begin around end-2026/early-2027.
